classifieds_0.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The agent did not utilize any sorting options (e.g., "Sort by: Price - Low to High") to efficiently identify the cheapest kayak.
2. The agent did not thoroughly scan all available kayak listings to confirm that the selected item was indeed the cheapest *blue* kayak, instead selecting one without comprehensive comparison.
classifieds_0.REFLECTION: After filtering search results by category, always prioritize using available sorting options to order items by price (lowest to highest). If no sorting option is present, carefully examine all relevant listings on the page, verifying both the item's color and price to ensure the absolute cheapest item matching all criteria is selected before navigating to its page.
